name_en: Top-tier original M82210 White Full Leather Chain Bag Series M81911 Wallet On Chain Ivy Handbag. Made of Monogram canvas, inspired by the 2000s Sac Recoleta bag. Features card slots and zippered interior pockets for daily essentials. Chain and adjustable leather shoulder straps are detachable for crossbody and shoulder carry options. size:23.5x12x4.3cmxs
